title: Telecom Atlas
subtitle: How a telecom company actually works
overview: From the SIM in your pocket to the subsea cable under the ocean — and the software empire (BSS & OSS) that turns signals into money. Built to zoom out to a single map, or zoom in until you could run the place.

sections.heading: The Problem
sections.body: How a telecom company actually works

sections.heading: Key Insight
sections.body: A field guide to the business of connectivity
